title: Trouble mounts for UK PM Starmer as Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigns, setting up a potential leadership challenge
content:
UK Prime Minister Starmer is facing increasing difficulties.
*   His Health Secretary, Wes Streeting, has resigned from his position.
*   This resignation is seen as potentially paving the way for a leadership challenge against Starmer.

title: US Senate unanimously approves salary freeze for lawmakers during federal shutdowns
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The US Senate has unanimously approved a salary freeze.
*   This measure specifically applies to lawmakers.
*   The freeze will take effect during federal government shutdowns.

title: Will lead to further inflation, growth estimates will be lowered considerably: Congress on fuel hike
content:
Congress warns that the recent fuel hike will lead to further inflation.
*   They predict a considerable lowering of economic growth estimates.
*   These negative economic impacts are attributed directly to the fuel price increase.

title: ​Bursting at the seams: On the rise in inflation
content:
Inflation is currently on a significant upward trend.
*   The overall economic situation is experiencing immense strain.
*   This rise in inflation is pushing financial limits, causing budgets to be "bursting at the seams" for consumers and potentially businesses.

title: Wholesale inflation jumps to 3.5-year high of 8.3% in April 2026 on West Asia impact
content:
Wholesale inflation reached a 3.5-year high in April 2026.
*   The inflation rate recorded was 8.3%.
*   This significant increase is attributed to the impact of events in West Asia.

title: Free and fair elections can happen only if there are independent Election Commissioners, SC says
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Supreme Court has declared that free and fair elections are directly dependent on the independence of Election Commissioners.
*   It emphasizes that such independence is the *only condition* under which genuine democratic elections can truly occur.
*   This statement highlights the critical necessity of impartial electoral bodies to uphold the integrity and fairness of the election process.
